name: input
visual_summary: A text input component is a field where users can enter information. It typically consists of a rectangular box, an input cursor, and a placeholder text that suggests what information should be entered. Developers would use this component to collect user data in a variety of applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input
Description: A text input component is a field where users can enter information. It typically consists of a rectangular box, an input cursor, and a placeholder text that suggests what information should be entered. Developers would use this component to collect user data in a variety of applications.
Style: text box, form field, rounded corners, box shadow
Interactions: on change event, placeholder text, auto focus
Tags: input, field, text field, form element, user input

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
